healthReason: Sprint KE-3 complete — all 5 issues closed, v2.10.3 published, PR #1303 closed, no open kernel squad PRs, 4129/4129 tests passing.
summary: KE-3 sprint COMPLETE. All sprint issues closed this cycle: #1316 (v2.10.3 Go kernel binaries — closed 13:43Z), #1341 (SessionStart install check — closed 14:58Z), #1322 (Turbo cache bootstrap — closed 14:59Z), #1325 (no-governance-self-modification guide-mode — closed 13:43Z), #1332 (mkdir .agentguard blocked — closed 13:43Z). PR #1303 (KE-2 Go delegation) closed without merge 13:21Z — issues already resolved via v2.10.3 patch. PR #1371 (rtk prefix bootstrap fix, closes P1 #1347) is CI-green (4/4) and awaiting architect merge. Transitioning to KE-4.
